message:
fix: add missing spec_id to SQL queries using scanIssues

The spec_id column was added to the issues schema but several SQL
SELECT statements were not updated to include it. This caused a
scan mismatch error: expected 43 destination arguments in Scan,
not 44.

Fixed queries:
- GetReadyWork (ready.go)
- GetNewlyUnblockedByClose (ready.go)
- GetIssuesByLabel (labels.go)
- TestMigrateContentHashColumn test schema (migrations_test.go)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -170,7 +170,7 @@ func (s *SQLiteStorage) GetIssuesByLabel(ctx context.Context, label string) ([]*
 	rows, err := s.db.QueryContext(ctx, `
 		SELECT i.id, i.content_hash, i.title, i.description, i.design, i.acceptance_criteria, i.notes,
 		       i.status, i.priority, i.issue_type, i.assignee, i.estimated_minutes,
-		       i.created_at, i.created_by, i.owner, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.external_ref, i.source_repo, i.close_reason,
+		       i.created_at, i.created_by, i.owner, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.external_ref, i.spec_id, i.source_repo, i.close_reason,
 		       i.deleted_at, i.deleted_by, i.delete_reason, i.original_type,
 		       i.sender, i.ephemeral, i.pinned, i.is_template, i.crystallizes,
 		       i.await_type, i.await_id, i.timeout_ns, i.waiters,

@@ -170,7 +170,7 @@ func (s *SQLiteStorage) GetReadyWork(ctx context.Context, filter types.WorkFilte

 		SELECT i.id, i.content_hash, i.title, i.description, i.design, i.acceptance_criteria, i.notes,
 		i.status, i.priority, i.issue_type, i.assignee, i.estimated_minutes,
-		i.created_at, i.created_by, i.owner, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.external_ref, i.source_repo, i.close_reason,
+		i.created_at, i.created_by, i.owner, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.external_ref, i.spec_id, i.source_repo, i.close_reason,
 		i.deleted_at, i.deleted_by, i.delete_reason, i.original_type,
 		i.sender, i.ephemeral, i.pinned, i.is_template, i.crystallizes,
 		i.await_type, i.await_id, i.timeout_ns, i.waiters,
@@ -784,7 +784,7 @@ func (s *SQLiteStorage) GetNewlyUnblockedByClose(ctx context.Context, closedIssu

 		SELECT i.id, i.content_hash, i.title, i.description, i.design, i.acceptance_criteria, i.notes,
 		       i.status, i.priority, i.issue_type, i.assignee, i.estimated_minutes,
-		       i.created_at, i.created_by, i.owner, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.external_ref, i.source_repo, i.close_reason,
+		       i.created_at, i.created_by, i.owner, i.updated_at, i.closed_at, i.external_ref, i.spec_id, i.source_repo, i.close_reason,
 		       i.deleted_at, i.deleted_by, i.delete_reason, i.original_type,
 		       i.sender, i.ephemeral, i.pinned, i.is_template, i.crystallizes,
 		       i.await_type, i.await_id, i.timeout_ns, i.waiters,
